Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4086 0 0}Well done, everyone. That was a formidable opponent.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Heh, okay, my stunning performance aside, aren't all of us totally on the same wavelength now?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Let's not bring up your "stunning performance" ever... And I'd rather not be on the same wavelength as you, either.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Wha— Why not!? Teamwork makes the dream work, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1123 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Well, I guess you have a point... Let's keep up the good work, {f 4 1}-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}We're doing good work for a new team. Let's keep up the pace.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Right now, Tartarus is our only lead to unravel the mystery behind the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Alrighty! Then let's just keep on moving![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1114 0 0}We can move on now, but the next floor doesn't look any different...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}You don't think it'll be the same old thing forever, do you...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Yeah, you're right. It's just... I want to at least feel like we're making progress.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2062 0 0}I getcha, Yuka-tan. Spend too long in the Tartarus tartar sauce, and anybody'd be cravin' for barbecue.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}What the heck are you saying...? Well, at least you agree it's hard to push through the same thing over and over again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4025 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Right. Part of our objective is to discover what lies ahead. All we can do now is keep moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}No point overthinking things now... All we gotta do is keep moving forward.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 2 25 25}...After all, I've already made up my mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2105 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Oh, look at you all fired up. What's gotten into you all of a sudden?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 4 25 25}Oh, um... Nothing, really. Anyway, enough about me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}We gotta keep going, right? C'mon, let's get a move on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}And another one bites the dust! We're on a roll, guys![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}While we're at it, how about we spice things up every now and then? Like by changin' up the leader...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}What? I was worried about what you'd say next...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Don'tcha wanna see how I'd run this whole shebang? Well, don'tcha?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4122 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}...Wait. It wouldn't be wise for a change in command in the middle of an expedition.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}We're making steady progress under {f 4 1}'s lead, so let's continue as we have been.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}But I'm pretty sure I could just take down the enemies here aaaaaall by myself...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1076 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Chill out, Junpei... If you're not careful, it won't be long till you get hurt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}Takeba's right. We can expect another strong enemy to appear.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Don't let your guard down as we proceed.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_1_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}Okaaay, whatever... Guess there's always next time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1113 0 0}Phew... We won. Seems like we'll keep running into stronger enemies whenever we enter a new area.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Akihiko will also be back soon. We could always pick things up once he's ready to join us.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}I can't wait for Sanada-san to hop on board.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Then we'll finally be a four-man band! You know, the standard for an RPG.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}Junpei Quest: The Legend of Junpei, Tower of Mystery! Now, let us head off, comrades![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1143 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}We don't need you to head off anywhere. Haven't you learned your lesson at all?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}We need your head screwed on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}Whaddaya mean? I've got a perfectly good head on my shoulders![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4106 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}In that case, I suppose there's no need to worry about your studies?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}Oh, Brave Knight {f 4 2}! Let us hurry and depart![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4107 0 0}You did an excellent job, especially against such a strong enemy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}The same can be said about the battle with the large Shadow. I'm surprised at how fast you've all improved.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}It's definitely all natural-born talent! I think I'll make it all the way to the top at this rate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}You always get so carried away... But if you're aiming for the top, I guess I'll tag along for the ride.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}Heh, I see you're all as dependable as ever.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 50 0 0}There may not be a need for Akihiko or me to join your battles... Though Akihiko wouldn't be very happy about that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2133 0 0}Haha, I'd pay to see Sanada-san pouting. It'd be hilarious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}What awaits us is an unknown frontier. All of you, proceed with caution.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_033_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}(sigh) What's with these back-to-back fights?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_034_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}Так, це вперше. Це як, темп, будь-хто?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}I can't get a read on a pattern for these floors... There's simply too much about which we're still in the dark.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Нам потрібно готуватися ще ретельніше, і швидко відступати, коли ми виснажені.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1061 0 0}Maybe we'd have an easier time with Sanada-senpai around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Yeah... Wouldn't he be happy about fightin' a bunch of tough enemies anyways?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}I can definitely see that... Nevertheless, he'd greatly increase our firepower.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Well, if you plan on proceeding, then do so carefully. I'm counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_039_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4115 0 0}Nicely done. Doesn't seem like you're having any problems.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}Though I've never underestimated you in the first place, you're performing better than expected.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_041_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2095 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Heheh! Now I'm gettin' pumped up! Ain't every day you get a compliment from Kirijo-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_044_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}You heard what she said... Stop fishing for more.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_045_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}N-No! I seriously couldn't hear her! There was, like, static or something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_046_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}...Check, check, one, two, one, two. How is it? Can you hear me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_048_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Wha...? Was it just my imagination? Sorry, my bad.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_049_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}No, if you have any concerns, don't be afraid to relay them to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}For the time being, it seems there aren't any problems, so let's get back to exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_050_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4112 0 0}I can't let my guard down... Especially not around those Gatekeepers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_051_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}...I've never seen you with your guard down, though—not even in the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}When we're up late on a mission, I've never even seen you yawn, much less doze off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Then the next day, you're all dressed up and drinking black tea before heading to school fifteen minutes later.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_053_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1064 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}Huh? Uh, no, not really. When you live in the same dorm, you start to pick some things up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_055_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Besides... wouldn't you find it offensive if I were to take it easy?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}After all, I'm the one asking you all to attempt the impossible when taking part in these "club activities."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_056_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}C'mon, Leader. We've beaten them, so let's move on. Hurry, clock's ticking![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_057_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5011 0 0}Gatekeeper eliminated. No other Shadow activity detected in the vicinity.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_058_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Roger that. Seems like we'll be able to take a small breather here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_059_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}Let me guess: you had a lot of stress pent up from being stuck as support this whole time?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_060_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4035 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Not at all. I was just thinking about how Yamagishi sounded so dependable.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_062_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}The connection is stable, and you accurately predict the Shadows' locations, too.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}You're exactly what we need. Don't you think so too, {f 4 1}?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_064_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 4 -1 50 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 5035 0 0}Y-You're exaggerating... Right now, I'm just trying to keep up with everyone.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}But... I'll do my best to meet your expectations![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_065_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Heh, even though I'm speaking right now? Though I should be glad you didn't say I was annoying.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}Rest assured, I'm perfectly capable of giving you an earful while on the front lines as well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_066_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}...Now that we're all rested, shall we keep going?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_067_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 1 -1 50 0 0}Okay, I've got your back, so let's move out once everyone's ready.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_068_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2074 0 0}Hey, {f 4 2}, you've been at this nonstop, right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_069_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}Isn't that because {f 4 1}-kun is the leader?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_070_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}Well, we're all a team, so we can't just let him shoulder everything himself.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Shouldn't we have someone step up to the plate whenever he takes a break? Say... like a second?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_074_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}So if we had to pick his right-hand man, then it'd obviously be me, since I was the first one to bring it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_075_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}You didn't even let the rest of us get a word in... I bet you were angling for this from the beginning, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1060 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Yeah, I think so too. Plus, I feel like I can always count on {f 4 1}-kun... unlike someone else.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_076_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}...Yo, why you gotta look at me when you say that!? This is blatant favoritism![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2073 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}Dang, ice cold! C'mon, man, I was just thinkin' about what'd be best for you...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_077_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 6 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 6 25 25}Yeah, right... You were actually just thinking about yourself. It was so obvious.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}Anyway, if {f 4 1}-kun wanted to rest, he could just take a break from exploring.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_078_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 2 25 25}But still, if you need a hand, I'll be happy to switch with you anytime, {f 4 2}. Sleep on it, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_079_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 2088 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Booyah, nailed it! Now all the ladies say, "Yeeeah!"[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Man, if everyone could see me now, girls would be all over me...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}...But I guess that's not possible with the two of you around.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_080_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}Ain't that right, my fellow Yakushima Rejects?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_081_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3119 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 2 25 25}Don't give us such a weird nickname! I wasn't interested in picking up girls in the first place.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_082_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}Welp, it's just good to know that nobody's perfect—not even Sanada-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}I feel like the three of us got a lot closer that day... Don't you feel it, too?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_084_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3122 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 3 25 25}Hey... Are you sure you want to be lumped in together with Junpei?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_085_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 4 25 25}Hey, whaddaya mean by that!? Ain't it great we're getting along?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_086_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 3 25 25}If he were, then we'd just be two extras leeching off of his spotlight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_088_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 3091 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 2 25 25}Wha—? Are you talking about Aigis? That doesn't count! It's not fair play![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 3 25 25}Senpai, you're, like, dead serious, huh...? I guess a better word would be "real competitive."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_089_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 3 1 25 25}{f 4 23 1 4 0 25 25}But, hey, it's still summer! Meaning we got time to redeem ourselves, so why don't we sneak out at night or something and—[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_090_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 6 -1 50 0 0}We can hear everything you've said... Yukari-chan and Kirijo-senpai, too.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_092_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 6012 0 0}Confirmed annihilation of enemy Shadow... We are victorious.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san performed excellently as well. Once we return, we are to give you a reward, correct?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_094_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}What would best suffice as a reward for Koromaru-san?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_097_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san, you are drooling.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san is exuberant. Perhaps he is "one hungry boy," as they say.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_099_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san says that he is concerned about the current state of his coat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Please do maintenance for him when you have the time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Koromaru-san says, in response to your heartless words, that he will continue to do his best.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}Is this what they call... the carrot and the whip?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_101_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 7 0 -1 -1 0 0}I will also perform to the best of my ability in order to secure Koromaru-san the best possible reward.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_102_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7001 0 0}So everyone up until now has defeated lots of enemies like the one just now, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}When fighting enemies stronger than you... is there anything important to keep in mind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_104_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7061 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}In other words... stay calm? Like the blue ranger?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_105_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}Then... you're telling me to be bold, like the black ranger?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_106_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 7063 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 3 25 25}That's true... But I have to train more and get stronger. There's not much time...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_107_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 -1 50 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 0 25 25}Amada-kun, there's no need to be worried. It's fine to start out slow and steady.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_108_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 0 -1 -1 0 0}Um... I appreciate your concern, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_109_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9069 0 0}If he's saying he wants to get stronger, then let him do what he wants.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 4 25 25}He's long made up his mind. Since he's here and all.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_110_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 10 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 9081 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 0 25 25}There you have it. If you're really worried about him, then back him up.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_111_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 0 -1 50 0 0}Sorry, Amada-kun... Just let me know if you have trouble with anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_112_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 8 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 8 1 25 25}Yes, of course! Thank you so much! I really do appreciate your support![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_113_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 1119 0 0}Looks like we're about to reach the 200th floor... Just how tall is this place?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_114_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}At the very least, there should be an end. As for when we'll get there? We'll just have to keep climbing and find out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}...What's wrong, Yukari? Are you tired?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_115_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 1 25 25}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Ahaha, does it look like I'm dying? Well, I'm just raring to go, be it 300 or 400 floors![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_117_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4024 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}It truly is. I've a thing or two to learn from you about perseverance.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_118_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Wait a second... Is that supposed to be a compliment? But you're the same way, Mitsuru-senpai.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_119_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4131 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}That's right. All we need is for Yukari to whip everyone into shape.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_120_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Yeah, no, I'm not doing that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_121_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 3 0 -1 4132 0 0}{f 4 23 1 5 1 25 25}Heh, I know how you feel, but Yukari might get on your case, you know?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}Geez, Mitsuru-senpai... You're making me out to be a total witch, but I think I'd be nicer than you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_122_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 4 23 1 2 0 25 25}{f 4 23 1 5 0 25 25}Well then, wanna keep going, {f 4 1}-kun? Maybe we'll discover something.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_123_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}Yukari's right. Let's keep advancing, even if only a step at a time.[n]{f 1 1}
